subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that thou hast attained unto that Cause for the recognition of which the whole world was brought from nothingness into being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله فائز شدی بامریکه جمیع عالم از برای عرفان آن از عدم بوجود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital
